targets.name: Xorbits Inference (Xinference)
targets.surface: Multi-model inference server with REST API. Supports model upload, registration, and dynamic loading. HTTP endpoints for model management, file-based model storage, and multi-modal processing (text, audio, images).
attack_vectors: Model upload endpoint - potential path traversal
Multi-modal file processing - PDF, audio, image parsers
targets.reason: Only 2 known CVEs (2025) for low CVE count. Active development with 2026 commits. Python-based inference server similar to vLLM but less audited. File upload + model loading = RCE potential. Huntr has bounties for similar inference servers (TGI, Triton).

targets.name: Dify
targets.surface: Open-source LLM app development platform. REST API for workflow creation, file upload for RAG knowledge bases, document processing pipeline, plugin system with code execution, multi-tenant architecture.
attack_vectors: File upload for knowledge base - path traversal/RCE
Workflow code nodes - sandbox escape potential
Document parsers (PDF, DOCX, etc.) - parser vulnerabilities
Multi-tenant isolation - tenant data access bypass
targets.reason: Only 1 known CVE (CVE-2024-12776 - password reset). Massive attack surface: file upload + code execution + plugins + document parsing. Very popular (50k stars) = more users impacted. Active 2026 development. Python backend with FastAPI. Huntr bounty programs cover similar LLM platforms.

targets.name: Microsoft Presidio
targets.surface: PII detection and redaction framework. REST API for text/image analysis. File upload for document redaction (PDF, images, text). OCR integration for image text extraction. Analyzer and redactor services.
attack_vectors: Image redaction pipeline - image parsing vulnerabilities (Pillow CVEs)
OCR processing - untrusted input to OCR engine
targets.reason: Only 0-1 known CVEs (very low). Microsoft project = prestige bounty. File upload + image processing + OCR = multiple attack vectors. Python-based with Pillow/PIL usage (potential CVE-2025-48379). Active 2026 development. Unique target (PII redaction niche) = less competition.

data.notes: All targets excluded per user request: vLLM, DB-GPT, Langflow, RAGFlow, Flowise. Targets selected based on: Python language, REST API presence, file upload features, 2026 activity, low CVE count (<3), and huntr.com bounty eligibility.
